behavior_contract: Feature coverage matrix references every release behavioral test script.
Desktop startup bridge actions use explicit timeout policy.
Desktop startup prefers ready-port detect/start before ensure-site fallback.
Desktop launcher resolves URL port without command-substitution capture hangs.
Splash keeps a stable preparing message until ready or error.
Run stream polling drains final deltas before stop and avoids lost streamed content.
Run status copy remains latest-run scoped and non-contradictory while active runs continue.

Run-mode tuning, policy, controller directives, quick/budget routing, stream security parity, and state-memory focus stay synchronized across adaptive, programming, security, reporting, teaching, chat, and instant domains.
Canonical run modes and default-profile depth contracts stay synchronized across backend normalization, backend tuning, frontend normalization, and run-mode menus.
Measured capability benchmark evidence is converted into bounded task-relevant controller guidance for ordinary runs and remains wired into the main controller prompt.

Ordinary runs preserve benchmark-guidance focus as structured run-event trace data, including derived severity, scope, and trend metadata, and keep it visible through run-event normalization and advanced trace rendering.

Ordinary runs can reroute onto a better-matched installed model when benchmark-guidance families indicate a materially stronger choice for the current task, and severe sustained regressions carry stronger routing weight than mild improving cases.
Ordinary runs can raise reasoning floor and iteration minima from measured benchmark-guidance families, and report the resulting benchmark-aware effort profile in the stream.
Recent internal benchmark scorecards produce family-level improving/flat/regressing trajectories that propagate into runtime signals and ordinary-run guidance.
Compute budget, command execution mode, and permissions normalization stay synchronized across backend runtime rules, frontend state normalization, and visible control menus.
Runtime action surfaces canonicalize accepted aliases consistently for queue runs, automations, and command policy mode persistence.
Add Project supports ~/ expansion and modal action order.
Browse and directory picker populate folder path and placeholder.
Project rows drag from row surface (not drag-handle controls).
Automations appears as left-nav section with right-pane workflow.
Permissions include reflexive knowledge plus self-actuation and wire both through run/queue/runtime command gating.
Reflexive knowledge runtime exposes structured self-knowledge and contributor-level LLM/Ollama teaching surfaces through API and appctl.
Self-actuation supports id-safe list-and-mutate command workflows through appctl, runtime allowlists, and controller guidance.
Self-actuation and reflexive allowlists enforce strict per-command argument shape and gate-sensitive command access.
Self-actuation mediated operations succeed end-to-end in isolated runtime state (project/thread/automation create-list-mutate-verify-delete).
Self-actuation orchestration enforces preview/confirm, policy controls, idempotent apply replay, and auditable event history.
Every orchestrated self-actuation operation executes through preview/apply with state verification in isolated runtime.
Registry topics, reflexive prompt topics, GUI labels, and command-surface contracts stay synchronized without silent drift.
Self-knowledge teach/show payloads explain current strengths, model ceilings, engineering gaps, and measurable next improvements.
Self-improvement runtime evidence exposes the latest capability benchmark scorecards and comparisons for measured gap-aware improvement planning.
Benchmark compare evidence automatically adopts, stages, or rejects self-improvement plugins and disables unproven ideas after hold results.
Self-improvement plugins keep one current lineage record, accumulate benchmark outcome history, and require repeated evidence before adoption or rejection.
Manual self-improvement override controls, event handlers, action params, and backend persistence helpers stay wired together.
Operator overrides can force and lock plugin adoption state across lineage replacement while preserving the underlying automatic benchmark judgment for inspection.
Archived self-improvement plugins remain inspectable and operable through restore/delete controls, action surfaces, and backend helpers.
Archived self-improvement plugins can be listed, restored into locked review with stale age reset, blocked on active-lineage conflicts, and deleted from archive storage.
Stale auto-managed review/rejected plugins archive by compare-cycle age while adopted and operator-managed plugins remain visible and inventory stays inspectable.
Benchmark weak-family evidence changes self-improvement lane scoring, merged plugin priority, and stored plugin promotion metadata.
Cross-domain capability benchmark manifest, plan, score, and compare flows remain deterministic and promotable against real family scorecards.
Registry-backed external benchmark adapters can be listed, planned, and executed into valid external reference scorecards.
Capability benchmark external-compare writes first-class external baseline metadata, family gap deltas, and explicit recommendation artifacts.

Self-improvement UI summary, capability trend report, and plugin cards surface benchmark recommendation, internal regressions, external deficits, benchmark-guided plugin metadata, and plugin inventory counts.

Self-improvement runtime evidence exposes latest external capability benchmark compares, persistent external gap history, closing/flat/worsening trend signals, gap families, and external compare counts.
Self-improvement runtime evidence distinguishes one-step external gap motion from sustained multi-cycle worsening or closing and preserves trajectory summaries.
External baseline gap evidence, including persistent recurring deficit trends, changes self-improvement lane scoring, merged plugin priority, and stored last-run benchmark metadata.
Self-knowledge teach/show payloads for self-actuation remain explicit, operational, and diagnostically complete.
Model rows preserve description optionality and always include size metadata.
Model list refresh loop recovers after failed fetch cycles.
Desktop preferences persist via backend UI state API.
Runtime module fragments remain bounded and deterministically bundled.
Short form controls avoid global full-width anti-patterns.
Site runtime ensure-site sync keeps cgi runtime tree and links consistent.
Public CGI action surface remains allowlisted and bounded.
Large backend runtimes load from modular shard directories.
Runtime bootstrap falls back to home wizardry install safely.
Core runtime optional perl helpers have safe fallbacks.
Local paths and assay script site roots remain isolated from repo tree.
Generated artifacts are either ignored or regenerated from canonical sources.
Public publish surface avoids local/private defaults.
Third-party notices remain present and consistent.
Executable shell entrypoints enforce strict mode and safe PATH policy.
CI includes shell lint workflow for release scripts.
CI runs full release test suite hook.
